creative_brief: Split-screen or side-by-side visual: one person sitting in a dingy tyre shop waiting room (bored, clock on wall), the other relaxed at home on a laptop or phone. Clean, relatable, no stock-photo polish — should feel like a real moment.
primary_text:
"I paid $340 less than my mate did at the tyre shop last week."

He booked in, waited two hours, paid whatever they quoted. I searched by rego on Tyroola, compared 40+ brands, and had a mobile fitter come to me.

Same size tyres. Very different bill.

Tyroola shows every tyre that fits your car — with real prices, not the ones they make up at the counter. If you find it cheaper elsewhere, we'll beat it by 3%.

4,530+ Australians. 4.7/5 stars. 800+ fitting locations nationwide.
headline: Your mate overpaid. You don't have to.
description: Search by rego in seconds. Up to 50% off RRP. Mobile fitters come to you. Price matched or beaten by 3%.
